summary: Focana 2.2.0 makes planning and restarting work calmer, cleaner, and easier to adjust mid-session.
improvements: What's next? is simpler, with Start new task, Session History, and Parking Lot in a calmer stacked layout.
Session History now shows task names only; click one to review details before starting.
Session Builder is cleaner, with subtasks and Next-up tasks separated more clearly.
Subtasks can now be edited while the timer is running, with an Edit plan path from compact mode.
fixes: Spaces now work in subtask fields.
Enter now adds the next subtask row.
Subtasks now save correctly when continuing through Ready to resume.
